title: Accounting and Tax Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Simplify your finances with trusted accounting and tax services in Vietnam. Our experts ensure accuracy, compliance, and peace of mind — so you can focus on growth.

hero.title: Accounting and Tax Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Save money and time with our accounting services in Vietnam. Focus on your bottom line and let us streamline your tax returns and submissions. Avoid fines and legal pressure while maintaining full compliance.

sections.heading: Vietnam's Main Taxes on Foreign Companies
Outsource Your Accounting & Taxation Services to InCorp Vietnam
body: Recruiting and managing your accounting team can be costly, time-consuming, and sometimes frustrating. Let our SME accounting solutions handle your tax filing and submission, and financial statement preparation and reporting.

sections.heading: Accounting and Tax Report Setup – Implementation
body: InCorp Vietnam streamlines your business with efficient e-tax management and comprehensive tax services in Vietnam. We handle administrative tasks like E-invoice setup, online presence on the Government Portal, document collection, and tailored accounting software, freeing you to focus on business growth.

sections.heading: The Setup – Implementation service helps you:
items: Create an online account for the company on the Government Online Portal
Register of E-tax declaration and E-tax payment
Prepare online folders for collecting required accounting supporting documents from clients
Set up the initial accounts on Accounting Software based on your business lines

sections.heading: Monthly/ Quarterly Accounting
body: Discover InCorp's comprehensive routine accounting services to simplify your financial management and safeguard your business. Let us manage everything from accounting to tax filing, ensuring compliance with VAS and tax regulations.

sections.heading: The Monthly/Quarterly Accounting service helps you:
items: Review accounting invoices, and the documentation provided
Post day-to-day transactions into accounting software, comply with the Vietnam Accounting Standard (VAS) and tax regulations
Prepare statutory monthly/quarterly and yearly VAS reports (except PIT declaration and finalization)
Work with the Tax Department on tax compliance issues

sections.heading: Value Added Tax (VAT) Compliance Service
body: Our dedicated team for VAT services in Vietnam handles input and output obligations, manages monthly and quarterly declarations, processes refund claims for investors, and meets annual requirements on your behalf. Stay informed about VAT payments with our seamless tax compliance solutions.

sections.heading: The VAT Compliance Service helps you:
items: Prepare monthly/ quarterly VAT declarations
Update monthly/quarterly to the Client of the VAT payable and make the VAT payments
Submit monthly/quarterly the VAT declarations to the Tax Online Portal

sections.title: Not sure where to start? Talk to a consultant.
sections.subtitle: Whether you need an employer of record service or payroll services for small business, InCorp offers contractor payroll services that give your company a strategic advantage.

sections.heading: Corporate Income Tax (CIT) Compliance
body: Explore InCorp Vietnam's CIT management service, which simplifies your tax operations. We handle CIT installment calculation, business tax preparation, and payment reminders, and ensure smooth compliance for your business's success.

sections.heading: The CIT Compliance service helps you:
items: Prepare and calculate monthly/quarterly CIT installment amounts.
Update you monthly or quarterly on the CIT payables and proceeds with the CIT payments.

sections.heading: Year-end Services
body: InCorp Vietnam specializes in financial reporting services and annual CIT finalization for seamless tax compliance. Our services include preparing Financial Statements, facilitating CIT discussions, and ensuring smooth Tax Online Portal submissions. For FDI firms, we provide auditing services and comprehensive digital records for hassle-free financial management.

sections.heading: Our Year-end Compliance service helps you:
items: Prepare Financial Statements, and discuss the final CIT amount
Submit Financial Statements to Tax Online Portal https://thuedientu.gdt.gov.vn/
Support your team to work with independent auditors in Vietnam (for FDI companies)
Prepare and submit the Annual CIT Finalization (if using ad-hoc cost)
Hand over the implemented accounting books in digital format

sections.heading: Other Ad-hoc Services
body: InCorp Vietnam handles your FDI Company's financial statements submission and mandatory Department of Finance report submission so you can focus on your core business. We also print all tax declarations, statements, and records for your convenience.

sections.heading: Our Ad-hoc Financial Reporting Services Include
items: Submit Financial Statements to the Statistics Department and perform the Statistical Corporate investigation
Submit the hard copy of the Audited Financial Statements report to the Department of Finance (for FDI companies)
Print all Tax Declarations, Financial Statements, Inventory input-output, petty Cash payments/ receipts, General Ledger for Client's filing

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions on Accounting Services & Tax Reporting in Vietnam

items.q: How do I start outsourcing my accounting tasks in Vietnam?
items.a: You can fill out the inquiry form below, and our accounting experts will contact you promptly. Please specify your requirements so that we can tailor our complete bookkeeping services for your business.

items.q: How much does InCorp's accounting outsourcing service cost?
items.a: The cost varies based on your business needs. It depends on the reports you need prepared and filed and if you require daily, weekly, or monthly bookkeeping services.

items.q: What are the benefits of accounting outsourcing in Vietnam?
items.a: Outsourcing cuts costs (no need for an internal team), ensures compliance with Vietnam's changing financial regulations, and lets you focus on core business activities.

items.q: Does InCorp Vietnam offer other accounting outsourcing services?
items.a: In addition to accounting, we provide payroll processing, outsourcing, and corporate tax compliance, especially small business tax services in Vietnam.

items.q: Is accounting outsourcing suitable for all businesses?
items.a: Yes, you can outsource accounting services for large corporations or small businesses. At InCorp Vietnam, we provide tailored solutions to meet your needs.

items.q: How skilled is your accounting team?
items.a: Our dedicated team is highly skilled, experienced in major accounting software, and up-to-date with Vietnamese bookkeeping, accounting, and tax regulations.

items.q: If my company has no activities, should I still report taxation?
items.a: Yes, even with no activities, monthly and annual reports are mandatory once your company is established.

items.q: What are the deadlines for annual tax return?
items.a: Both corporate and individual tax returns are due by March 31st.

items.q: What are Vietnam's corporate income tax rates?
items.a: The CIT rate differs depending on the type of business: 20% for standard industries, and 32%-50% for sectors like oil and gas.

items.q: What is Vietnam's standard financial year?
items.a: January 1st to December 31st is the standard financial year. However, under specific conditions, SMEs in Vietnam may choose alternative financial years ending on March 31, June 30, or September 30.

items.q: How is corporate income tax calculated?
items.a: Corporate income tax is calculated based on assessable income. Please contact our tax specialists for details on what this includes.
